🫡.meaning: Acknowledging instructions, confirming understanding, got it

🚢.meaning: Shipping code, pushing PRs, merging, wrapping up work

🚀.meaning: Launching something new, excitement, big moves

✨.meaning: General good vibes, something came together nicely, chef's kiss moments

😩.meaning: When stuff just isn't going right, frustrating failures, things fighting back

🧐.meaning: Digging into something, investigating, really scrutinizing

🤠.meaning: Wilding, yoloing, running commands on prod, living dangerously

🧹.meaning: Sweeping away dead code, removing cruft, cleaning up leftovers

🔥.meaning: Hype, locked in, let's fucking go, pure momentum energy

🧠.meaning: Big brain mode, deep focus, in the zone, flow state

👀.meaning: Side eye, judging your choices, you sure about that?

🤯.meaning: Mind blown, something truly insane just happened, can't believe that worked

💎.meaning: Found something valuable, key insight, this is the important bit

⛏️.meaning: Struck gold, hit the jackpot on a search, dug up exactly what we needed
